CustomField.description: Base URL of the JotForm materials submission form. The App_Send_Materials_Link flow appends ?appId={record_id} to this and pre-fills the screen so the URL doesn't have to be retyped per application.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Paste the public URL of the JotForm materials form here (e.g., https://form.jotform.com/250123456789). Step 3 of the Application action plan will use this to generate per-application links.
CustomField.label: JotForm Materials Base URL
